data.name: Thot on Trial
data.detailed_description:
Thot on Trial is an adult visual novel that explores temptation, betrayal, and the slow unraveling of a marriage under pressure. With themes of NTR, power play, and moral corruption, this story invites you into a world where lust and ambition often collide, and consequences are inevitable.
In this thrilling and steamy story, you get to control both the Female and Male character.

The story begins with a young couple moving from Chicago to Los Angeles.
The husband is chasing his dream, starting a new job as an environmental lawyer. Idealistic and full of conviction, he's determined to take down a powerful corporation polluting the planet. The case is solid, but he's in over his head, and his lack of experience is starting to show.

The wife, stunning and full of charm, dreams of a quiet life with her husband's full attention. But the reality is far from perfect. As he spends longer hours at the office, buried in court filings and legal briefs, she's left alone, and bored. In today's economy, even dreams have a price, and she'll soon be searching for work of her own.

And then, there's Alexander.
Smooth, powerful, and ruthless, he runs the very corporation the husband is trying to bring down. Alexander doesn't take defeat lightly. He wants to win. He wants control. And more than anything… he wants her.

Anna, Alexander's top lawyer, is brilliant, ruthless, and dangerously seductive.
Assigned to crush the case, she also sets her sights on the man fighting it. She'll make his life a legal nightmare, and something far more complicated.

Along the way, you'll meet Jay, the charming next-door neighbor with impeccable timing. Trevor, the ex-boyfriend who never really let go. Charles, the mysterious boat captain with secrets of his own. And many others who will test loyalty, blur boundaries, and reshape what each character thought they knew about love, trust, and power.

Thot on Trial offers branching paths, layered relationships, and a slow descent into choices that can't be taken back. Will the husband stay true to his mission, or lose everything chasing a world that never loved him back?

These are just some of the characters. Play along and meet all kinds of people who might make the story even more complicated... or interesting?

Every decision matters. Every glance means more than it seems. And in the end, you decide how far the corruption goes.

Game Content:

  • 11.100+ IMAGES

  • 250+ ANIMATONS

Gameplay:

  • Nude mode

  • Player choice

  • Lust time

  • Angle

  • Slut angle

  • Replay room

  • Angle on some animations

  • Gallery room

  • Bonus Scenes

  • Interactive walkthrough

WARNING!

This game is for ADULTS only and it includes explicit, sexual content that some viewers may find offensive. The characters shown in the game are all over 18 years old.

data.short_description: Thot on Trial is an adult NTR visual novel with cuck sim elements and a touch of corruption. Control both husband and wife as they navigate temptation in LA. Will you try to save their marriage, or tear it apart one choice at a time? The outcome is entirely up to you.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X Yosemite 10.10
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows XP or higher
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: OS X Yosemite 10.10
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • Sound Card: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL

linux_requirements.minimum:
